title: Massachusetts Public Records Request — MassAbility DDS Core Reports, Budget, Systems, Telework, and Workforce
description: Ready-to-file Massachusetts Public Records Law (M.G.L. c. 66, § 10) primary request to MassAbility (formerly MRC) for core DDS division records: unpublished Annual / Section 9F reports (FY2002-2022), DDS operating budget FY2013-2022, operational-defect and COVID remote-operations records (incoming-fax failure rate + NCPS template process, case-processing-system outages/helpdesk tickets, CE no-show & vendor turnaround, MER overdue counts, decision-notice mailing delays, exact DDS COVID work-from-home/telework start directive, whether initial virtual work was full-time/five days per week, later three-day hybrid/telework transition records, remote-access/VPN rollout records), and workforce records (vacancy/time-to-fill/separations, trainee pipeline, Form 30 position descriptions, grievance & reasonable-accommodation aggregates, any DDS-specific or DDS-inclusive staff climate/culture survey/report conducted by an outside firm or internally in 2017-2020). The operational-metrics, reconciliation, workload, overtime, and special-population asks formerly in Sections 2, 3, 6, 7, and 9 were split into prr-templates/massability-dds-prr-2 at user direction. Written in an individual member/steward capacity. Supersedes prr-templates/massability-prr.
geographic_coverage: Massachusetts (DDS division of MassAbility / former MRC; Boston and Worcester offices)

source.publisher: MassAbility (formerly Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission) — Records Access Officer (request target)
source.title: Massachusetts Public Records Request — M.G.L. c. 66, § 10

update_cadence: As needed (revise FY ranges, requester name, and metric list before each filing).
notes: Confidence tier = Authoritative because this file IS the canonical, repo-maintained state public-records request template — the authoritative artifact for the request workflow, not a derived data observation. It is a parameterized request carrying no fetched dataset values; requester contact fields are filled for Wardis Vizcaino using a personal, non-@ssa.gov email address. Supersedes the older prr-templates/massability-prr. Split on 2026-06-06 at user direction so the primary MassAbility PRR stays shorter; sections 2, 3, 6, 7, and 9 moved to prr-templates/massability-dds-prr-2. Does NOT reach the SSA/ODD per-state DDS budget ALLOCATION cells docs/methodology.md flags 'structurally unavailable' — those require the federal FOIA in prr-templates/ssa-foia-ma-dds. Reasoning recorded in docs/records-request-gap-analysis.md.
